title: Login Issue
description: User is unable to login even after entering correct credentials. The system continuously shows an 'Invalid email or password' message. The issue persists across different browsers and devices. The user has already tried resetting the password but still cannot access the account. Immediate investigation is required to check authentication and database validation processes.

title: Payment Failed
description: Customer attempted to complete a payment transaction, but the system displayed a failure message. However, the payment amount was deducted from the customer's bank account. The issue may be related to payment gateway timeout or server response delay. The customer is requesting an urgent refund or confirmation of the transaction status.

title: UI Bug on Dashboard
description: The dashboard layout breaks when accessed from mobile devices and smaller screen sizes. Several UI components overlap each other, and navigation buttons become unresponsive. The responsiveness needs to be reviewed, especially CSS grid and flexbox configurations, to ensure a smooth user experience across all devices.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sent
description: User requested a password reset multiple times but did not receive any reset email. The spam folder was checked, and no email was found. There may be an issue with the email service configuration or SMTP server. The email delivery logs should be verified to identify the root cause.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: The website becomes extremely slow during peak hours, especially when multiple users access the system simultaneously. Pages take more than 10 seconds to load, which significantly impacts user experience. Possible causes include server overload, unoptimized database queries, or lack of caching mechanisms.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: Users encounter an error message while attempting to upload a profile picture. The upload process fails regardless of image format (JPG, PNG) or size. The issue might be related to file size validation, server storage limits, or incorrect API configuration for file handling.

title: Search Not Working
description: The search functionality is not returning relevant results based on user queries. In some cases, no results are displayed even when matching data exists in the database. The issue may be due to incorrect query filtering, indexing problems, or API response errors.

title: Notification Delay
description: Push notifications are significantly delayed and sometimes delivered several minutes after the triggering event. This delay affects real/time communication and user engagement. The notification service integration and background job scheduling system need to be reviewed.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Users encounter a '500 Internal Server Error' while attempting to complete the checkout process. The issue occurs after submitting payment details, which disrupts order placement. Backend server logs should be examined to identify unhandled exceptions or database transaction failures.

title: Account Deactivation Request
description: The customer has requested account deactivation through support but reports that the account remains active. There might be a workflow issue in the deactivation process or a missing confirmation step. The support team should verify the request and ensure proper account closure procedures are followed.

title: Data Sync Issue
description: User data is not syncing properly across multiple devices. Changes made on one device are not reflected on others in real-time. The synchronization mechanism, API responses, and database update logic should be thoroughly tested to ensure data consistency.

title: Subscription Cancellation Error
description: Users are unable to cancel their subscription from the account settings page. The cancellation button either does not respond or shows an error message. This may be due to incorrect API endpoint handling or payment gateway integration issues.

title: Broken Link in Footer
description: A link located in the website footer redirects users to a 404 error page instead of the intended destination. The routing configuration or URL mapping may be incorrect. All footer links should be tested to ensure proper navigation.

title: App Crash on Startup
description: The mobile application crashes immediately after launch without displaying any error message. This issue affects multiple devices and operating system versions. Crash logs and debugging tools should be used to identify compatibility or initialization errors.

title: Language Change Not Saving
description: When users select a preferred language from the settings, the change is not saved after refreshing the page. The system resets to the default language. The issue might be related to local storage handling or missing backend persistence logic.
